name: OS Package Installer
description: Install packages from the operating system's native package manager (apt, apk, dnf, zypper, pacman, brew).

install_self.description:
Install the 'install-os-pkg' system command.
When true, a wrapper script is written to /usr/local/bin/install-os-pkg
so other features or scripts can invoke the installer directly.
Defaults to false; set to true only when you need the system command.

interactive.description:
Run in interactive mode.
By default, the installation runs non-interactively.
Set this flag to allow interactive prompts.

keep_repos.description:
Keep added repositories after installation.
By default, any repository drop-in files written during installation
are removed after the script finishes.
Set this flag to keep them permanently.

lifecycle_hook.description:
Defer package installation to a devcontainer lifecycle hook.
When set, the feature registers a hook script instead of installing
packages at build time. The script is called by the devcontainer CLI
at the specified lifecycle event.
Supported values: onCreate, updateContent, postCreate.
Leave empty (the default) to install packages immediately at build time.

logfile.description: Log all output (stdout + stderr) to this file in addition to console.

keep_cache.description:
Keep the package manager cache after installation.
By default, the package manager's cache is cleaned after installation
to reduce image size. Set this flag to preserve the cache.

manifest.description:
Inline manifest content or path to a manifest file.
Accepts YAML, JSON, or the legacy text-DSL format.

YAML/JSON manifest keys:
  packages: list of package names or objects {name, version?, flags?, when?}.
  apt / brew / dnf / apk / zypper / pacman: PM-specific package lists.
  keys: list of {url, dest} objects for signing keys (dest ending .gpg → dearmored).
  repos: list of repo strings or {content} objects added before installation.
  ppas: list of PPA identifiers (APT only, e.g. 'ppa:git-core/ppa').
  taps: list of Homebrew tap names or {name, url} objects (brew only).
  copr: list of COPR names (DNF only, e.g. 'user/repo').
  modules: list of DNF module streams (DNF only).
  groups: list of package-group names.
  casks: list of Homebrew cask names (macOS brew only).
  prescript / script: shell commands run before / after package installation.
  when: top-level condition evaluated against OS context. Supports field=value
        comparisons on /etc/os-release fields plus 'pm', 'arch', 'kernel'.

Legacy text-DSL format: sections prefixed with '--- type [selectors]' headers.

Inline content is detected when the value contains a newline;
otherwise the value is treated as a file path.

update.description:
Update package lists before installation.
By default, package lists are refreshed before installing packages.
Set to false to skip the update step.

lists_max_age.description:
Maximum age of package lists (in seconds) before an update is considered necessary.
When the package lists were refreshed more recently than this threshold the update
step is skipped automatically (unless a new repository was added by the manifest).
Set to 0 to always update. Has no effect when update is false.

dry_run.description:
Print what would be installed/fetched without making any changes.
No packages are installed, no files are written, and no scripts are executed.
Root privilege is not required when this is set.

skip_installed.description:
Skip packages that are already available in PATH.
When true, each package name is checked with 'command -v' before installation.
Packages whose binary is already present in PATH are skipped regardless of
whether they were installed via the system package manager.

prefer_linuxbrew.description:
Prefer Homebrew over the native Linux package manager.
When true and Homebrew is installed on Linux, 'brew' is used instead of
the native package manager (apt, dnf, etc.).
Has no effect on macOS (brew is always used there).
